name: 連環打臉復仇（斷絕關係場景）
description: 女主一一展示她為每個家人精心準備的禮物（爬八千階求來的安神香、凌晨四點煮的粥、半年修復的畫），然後揭露她身上穿的不過是20美元的舊衣，打臉獅家人「我們養了你」的指控。觀眾滿足感來自於真相的力量擊碎了虛偽的道德綁架。

examples.drama_title: 👑Abandoned by Family, She is Reborn as the Wife of a Billionaire, and They Beg for Her Forgiveness!
examples.excerpt: Kasum, you always suffer from insomnia while doing research. This is soothing incense. I prayed for you after climbing 8,000 steps up the temple path. ... As for the clothes I'm wearing, they are just $20 thrift store items. I never took anything from your lion's family.
